The '''dartship''' was a [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] version of a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]. They were mass-produced during the [[Dark Nest Crisis]] and used against both the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. There were two main variants: one with a rocket-powered engine, the other with an [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drive]]. The latter became much more common as the [[Gorog]] assumed a more active role in [[the Colony]] and began making preparations for war.

Two types of fuel seem to have been used on the rocket-powered dartships. The [[Qoribu]] nests for a time used [[Methane/Legends|methane]]. [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] believed the colony's reluctance to switch to [[Hydrogen/Legends|hydrogen]] was because the Killiks produced the methane themselves. It was later deduced by [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] that a swarm of the craft that attacked the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] were powered by hydrogen, as they had a far greater performance ratio than normal dartships. These fighters were later revealed to belong to the Gorog; however, ion propulsion found prevalence among the Dark Nest as it tightened its grasp on the colonies.

These fighters were also notorious for their ramming tactics which was used around [[Qoribu]] when dartships en masse rammed a [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] and destroyed it.

Dartships also carried payloads of "primitive" chemical explosives.
